TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Sakizaya, story: skzyNr-frog_bunuk
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: izaw kya wawa ya wacu ya balaut.
S.PHON: izaw kja wawa ja waʦu ja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: izaw kya wawa ya wacu ya balaut.
S.PHON: izaw kja wawa ja waʦu ja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 有小孩、狗和青蛙.
There are a child, a dog and a frog.

S.FORM: sademidemiadsa kuheni misalama.
S.PHON: sadəmidəmiadsa kuħəni misar~ɾama.
S.FORM: sademidemiadsa kuheni misalama.
S.PHON: sadəmidəmiadsa kuħəni misar~ɾama.
S.TRANSL: 他們每天玩耍.
They play every day.

S.FORM: pazeng han nya wawa i tiza i cungal kya balaut.
S.PHON: pazəŋ ħan nja wawa i tiza i ʦuŋar~ɾ kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: pazeng han nya wawa i tiza i cungal kya balaut.
S.PHON: pazəŋ ħan nja wawa i tiza i ʦuŋar~ɾ kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩把青蛙放在瓶中.
That child put the frog in the bottle.

S.FORM: tu labi satu sa mabi' kya wawa.
S.PHON: tu r~ɾabi satu sa mabiʔ~ʡ kja wawa.
S.FORM: tu labi satu sa mabi' kya wawa.
S.PHON: tu r~ɾabi satu sa mabiʔ~ʡ kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩在晚上睡覺.
That child was sleeping at night.

S.FORM: melaw han kya balaut sa.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan kja bar~ɾaut sa.
S.FORM: melaw han kya balaut sa.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan kja bar~ɾaut sa.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙被 看.
That frog was seen .

S.FORM: kidem a tahkal kiza balaut na i.
S.PHON: kidəm a taħkar~ɾ kiza bar~ɾaut na i.
S.FORM: kidem a tahkal kiza balaut na i.
S.PHON: kidəm a taħkar~ɾ kiza bar~ɾaut na i.
S.TRANSL: 在瓶子的那隻青蛙偷跑出去.
The frog that was in the bottle went out secretly.

S.FORM: mulkal sa kya wawa melaw sa tya cungal.
S.PHON: mur~ɾkar~ɾ sa kja wawa mər~ɾaw sa tja ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.FORM: mulkal sa kya wawa melaw sa tya cungal.
S.PHON: mur~ɾkar~ɾ sa kja wawa mər~ɾaw sa tja ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩醒來並看那瓶子.
That child woke up and saw that bottle.

S.FORM: inayi' kya balaut.
S.PHON: inajiʔ~ʡ kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: inayi' kya balaut.
S.PHON: inajiʔ~ʡ kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙不見了.
That frog disappeared.

S.FORM: kuheni a tya wacu tacuwa kya balaut sa makakilimtu.
S.PHON: kuħəni a tja waʦu taʦuwa kja bar~ɾaut sa makakir~ɾimtu.
S.FORM: kuheni a tya wacu tacuwa kya balaut sa makakilimtu.
S.PHON: kuħəni a tja waʦu taʦuwa kja bar~ɾaut sa makakir~ɾimtu.
S.TRANSL: 他們去找青蛙了.
They searched for that frog.

S.FORM: i labu nu kucu belihen nya wawa.
S.PHON: i r~ɾabu nu kuʦu bər~ɾiħən nja wawa.
S.FORM: i labu nu kucu belihen nya wawa.
S.PHON: i r~ɾabu nu kuʦu bər~ɾiħən nja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 鞋子被小孩翻過來.
The shoes were turned upside down by the child.

S.FORM: ha kakabi'antu i kalibungantu kilim sa kuheni tya wacu tya wacu sa.
S.PHON: ħa kakabiʔ~ʡantu i kar~ɾibuŋantu kir~ɾim sa kuħəni tja waʦu tja waʦu sa.
S.FORM: ha kakabi'antu i kalibungantu kilim sa kuheni tya wacu tya wacu sa.
S.PHON: ħa kakabiʔ~ʡantu i kar~ɾibuŋantu kir~ɾim sa kuħəni tja waʦu tja waʦu sa.
S.TRANSL: 他們在床上床下一直找.
They were looking for

S.FORM: pacumud han nya wacu a misanek kya cungal.
S.PHON: paʦumud ħan nja waʦu a misanək kja ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.FORM: pacumud han nya wacu a misanek kya cungal.
S.PHON: paʦumud ħan nja waʦu a misanək kja ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 狗把頭放到瓶中並聞一聞.

TRANSL.notes: That dog put (his head) into the bottle and smelled it.

S.TRANSL: That dog put into the bottle and smelled it.

S.FORM: macaledung nya wacu kya cungal.
S.PHON: maʦar~ɾəduŋ nja waʦu kja ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.FORM: macaledung nya wacu kya cungal.
S.PHON: maʦar~ɾəduŋ nja waʦu kja ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 那狗把瓶子戴在頭上.
That dog put the bottle on its head.

S.FORM: hyahyaentu niza mibikbik kya cungal sa.
S.PHON: ħjaħjaəntu niza mibikbik kja ʦuŋar~ɾ sa.
S.FORM: hyahyaentu niza mibikbik kya cungal sa.
S.PHON: ħjaħjaəntu niza mibikbik kja ʦuŋar~ɾ sa.
S.TRANSL: 它一直想甩掉那瓶子.
It wanted to get rid of that bottle.

S.FORM: ca'ay kahuduc kya tangah niza i labu nu cungal.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kaħuduʦ kja taŋaħ niza i r~ɾabu nu ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.FORM: ca'ay kahuduc kya tangah niza i labu nu cungal.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kaħuduʦ kja taŋaħ niza i r~ɾabu nu ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 它拔不出頭來.
It failed to pull its head out.

S.FORM: misabalubalukudtu kya wacu.
S.PHON: misabar~ɾubar~ɾukudtu kja waʦu.
S.FORM: misabalubalukudtu kya wacu.
S.PHON: misabar~ɾubar~ɾukudtu kja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 那狗一直踢.
That dog kept kicking.

S.FORM: mahetik kya wacu nai kakabi'an tahkal tayza i i sasingalan.
S.PHON: maħətik kja waʦu nai kakabiʔ~ʡan taħkar~ɾ tajza i i sasiŋar~ɾan.
S.FORM: mahetik kya wacu nai kakabi'an tahkal tayza i i sasingalan.
S.PHON: maħətik kja waʦu nai kakabiʔ~ʡan taħkar~ɾ tajza i i sasiŋar~ɾan.
S.TRANSL: 那狗從床上跌下去,然後走出去到窗戶.
That dog fell from bed and then went out to the window.

S.FORM: mapeci'tu kya cungal.
S.PHON: mapəʦiʔ~ʡtu kja ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.FORM: mapeci'tu kya cungal.
S.PHON: mapəʦiʔ~ʡtu kja ʦuŋar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 那瓶子破了.
That bottle was broken.

S.FORM: a ya kya wacu aku sa kya wawa.
S.PHON: a ja kja waʦu aku sa kja wawa.
S.FORM: a ya kya wacu aku sa kya wawa.
S.PHON: a ja kja waʦu aku sa kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩大叫:「我的狗啊!」
That child exclaimed, "My dog!"

S.FORM: adada adada han niza kya wacu.
S.PHON: adada adada ħan niza kja waʦu.
S.FORM: adada adada han niza kya wacu.
S.PHON: adada adada ħan niza kja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 他對著狗說 '會痛嗎'
He asked that dog, "Is it painful?"

S.FORM: namahtik i tiza i hekal.
S.PHON: namaħtik i tiza i ħəkar~ɾ.
S.FORM: namahtik i tiza i hekal.
S.PHON: namaħtik i tiza i ħəkar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 掉到外面了.
fell outside.

S.FORM: tahkaltu kuheni mikilim balautaw balautaw sa kya wawa atu ya wacu' mikakilim i hekal.
S.PHON: taħkar~ɾtu kuħəni mikir~ɾim bar~ɾautaw bar~ɾautaw sa kja wawa atu ja waʦuʔ~ʡ mikakir~ɾim i ħəkar~ɾ.
S.FORM: tahkaltu kuheni mikilim balautaw balautaw sa kya wawa atu ya wacu' mikakilim i hekal.
S.PHON: taħkar~ɾtu kuħəni mikir~ɾim bar~ɾautaw bar~ɾautaw sa kja wawa atu ja waʦuʔ~ʡ mikakir~ɾim i ħəkar~ɾ.
S.TRANSL: 他們到外面找青蛙,叫著「青蛙啊!青蛙啊!」
They went out to search for frog, yelled "Frog! Frog!"

S.FORM: tayzatu i tiza i lutulutukantu buyubuyu'antu mikilim kya wawa atu ya wacu.
S.PHON: tajzatu i tiza i r~ɾutur~ɾutukantu bujubujuʔ~ʡantu mikir~ɾim kja wawa atu ja waʦu.
S.FORM: tayzatu i tiza i lutulutukantu buyubuyu'antu mikilim kya wawa atu ya wacu.
S.PHON: tajzatu i tiza i r~ɾutur~ɾutukantu bujubujuʔ~ʡantu mikir~ɾim kja wawa atu ja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩跟狗在草叢中及山中找.

TRANSL.notes: The child and dog searched (for the frog) in bushes and mountains.

S.TRANSL: The child and dog searched in bushes and mountains.

S.FORM: mamelaw nuheni kya kilang i tiza.
S.PHON: mamər~ɾaw nuħəni kja kir~ɾaŋ i tiza.
S.FORM: mamelaw nuheni kya kilang i tiza.
S.PHON: mamər~ɾaw nuħəni kja kir~ɾaŋ i tiza.
S.TRANSL: 他們看到樹.
They saw trees.

S.FORM: kya balaut hakay milimek i tiza sa kya wawa.
S.PHON: kja bar~ɾaut ħakaj mir~ɾimək i tiza sa kja wawa.
S.FORM: kya balaut hakay milimek i tiza sa kya wawa.
S.PHON: kja bar~ɾaut ħakaj mir~ɾimək i tiza sa kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩認為青蛙可能躲在那裡.
The child thought that frog might hide over there.

S.FORM: laday hantu niza kya wacu.
S.PHON: r~ɾadaj ħantu niza kja waʦu.
S.FORM: laday hantu niza kya wacu.
S.PHON: r~ɾadaj ħantu niza kja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 他就帶著狗.
He brought his dog.

S.FORM: mamelaw niza kya buhang i tiza i labu i lala' balautaw balautaw han niza kya buhang nya lala'.
S.PHON: mamər~ɾaw niza kja buħaŋ i tiza i r~ɾabu i r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ bar~ɾautaw bar~ɾautaw ħan niza kja buħaŋ nja r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ.
S.FORM: mamelaw niza kya buhang i tiza i labu i lala' balautaw balautaw han niza kya buhang nya lala'.
S.PHON: mamər~ɾaw niza kja buħaŋ i tiza i r~ɾabu i r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ bar~ɾautaw bar~ɾautaw ħan niza kja buħaŋ nja r~ɾar~ɾaʔ~ʡ.
S.TRANSL: 他對著地上的洞喊:「青蛙啊!青蛙啊!」
He yelled to the hole on the ground, 'Frog! Frog!'

S.FORM: ya wacu sa waw waw waw mamelaw niza matating macacuy kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: ja waʦu sa waw waw waw mamər~ɾaw niza matatiŋ maʦaʦuj kja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: ya wacu sa waw waw waw mamelaw niza matating macacuy kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: ja waʦu sa waw waw waw mamər~ɾaw niza matatiŋ maʦaʦuj kja tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 狗吠及看到虎頭蜂窩垂掛著.
The dog barked and saw the beehives hang.

S.FORM: kya izaw ku mityungay i takuan sa huyahuyen nya wacu kya kilang.
S.PHON: kja izaw ku mitjuŋaj i takuan sa ħujaħujən nja waʦu kja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: kya izaw ku mityungay i takuan sa huyahuyen nya wacu kya kilang.
S.PHON: kja izaw ku mitjuŋaj i takuan sa ħujaħujən nja waʦu kja kir~ɾaŋ.

TRANSL.notes: (有人在輕拍) 那隻狗搖樹.

S.TRANSL: 那隻狗搖樹.

TRANSL.notes: (Someone was patting.) That dog shook that tree.

S.TRANSL: That dog shook that tree.

S.FORM: mihuyahuy kya ma mahica mahica sa kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: miħujaħuj kja ma maħiʦa maħiʦa sa kja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: mihuyahuy kya ma mahica mahica sa kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: miħujaħuj kja ma maħiʦa maħiʦa sa kja tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂怎麼了?
How was that hornet?

S.FORM: tahkal mubahel kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: taħkar~ɾ mubaħər~ɾ kja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: tahkal mubahel kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: taħkar~ɾ mubaħər~ɾ kja tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂飛出來.
The hornet flew out.

S.FORM: ya wawa nya niawawan kya balaut i tiza i labu nu buhang sa.
S.PHON: ja wawa nja niawawan kja bar~ɾaut i tiza i r~ɾabu nu buħaŋ sa.
S.FORM: ya wawa nya niawawan kya balaut i tiza i labu nu buhang sa.
S.PHON: ja wawa nja niawawan kja bar~ɾaut i tiza i r~ɾabu nu buħaŋ sa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩對著洞裡面呼喊著青蛙.
To the hole, that child yelled at the Frog.

S.FORM: matengil nya balaut ku ngiha' nya wawa tahkal kya balaut.
S.PHON: matəŋir~ɾ nja bar~ɾaut ku ŋiħaʔ~ʡ nja wawa taħkar~ɾ kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: matengil nya balaut ku ngiha' nya wawa tahkal kya balaut.
S.PHON: matəŋir~ɾ nja bar~ɾaut ku ŋiħaʔ~ʡ nja wawa taħkar~ɾ kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 那青蛙聽到聲音就出來.
That frog heard sound and came out.

S.FORM: ini kaku sa kya balaut.
S.PHON: ini kaku sa kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: ini kaku sa kya balaut.
S.PHON: ini kaku sa kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 青蛙說:「我在這.」
That frog said, "I am here."

S.FORM: melaw han kya tatekuh kya hiyan ku luma' aku mahetik nanihuyahuyan nya wacu kya tatekuh mahetik.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan kja tatəkuħ kja ħijan ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ aku maħətik naniħujaħujan nja waʦu kja tatəkuħ maħətik.
S.FORM: melaw han kya tatekuh kya hiyan ku luma' aku mahetik nanihuyahuyan nya wacu kya tatekuh mahetik.
S.PHON: mər~ɾaw ħan kja tatəkuħ kja ħijan ku r~ɾumaʔ~ʡ aku maħətik naniħujaħujan nja waʦu kja tatəkuħ maħətik.

TRANSL.notes: (為何把我家弄成這樣呢?) 虎頭蜂從狗搖的地方掉下來.

S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂從狗搖的地方掉下來.

TRANSL.notes: (Why did you do to my house?) The hornet fell off the place where the dog shook.

S.TRANSL: The hornet fell off the place where the dog shook.

S.FORM: u canan ku mahiniay sa kya tatekuh maidih a mukalat tya wacuan.
S.PHON: u ʦanan ku maħiniaj sa kja tatəkuħ maidiħ a mukar~ɾat tja waʦuan.
S.FORM: u canan ku mahiniay sa kya tatekuh maidih a mukalat tya wacuan.
S.PHON: u ʦanan ku maħiniaj sa kja tatəkuħ maidiħ a mukar~ɾat tja waʦuan.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂說:「為何會這樣?」 而且想咬那隻狗.
The hornet said, "Why is it in this way?" and wanted to bite that dog.

S.FORM: ya wawa han tya wawa sa mikalic i hiya i kilang.
S.PHON: ja wawa ħan tja wawa sa mikar~ɾiʦ i ħija i kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: ya wawa han tya wawa sa mikalic i hiya i kilang.
S.PHON: ja wawa ħan tja wawa sa mikar~ɾiʦ i ħija i kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩爬那個樹.
That child climbed that tree.

S.FORM: mamelaw niza kya tabakiay a kilang izaw ku buhang nya tabakiay a kilang.
S.PHON: mamər~ɾaw niza kja tabakiaj a kir~ɾaŋ izaw ku buħaŋ nja tabakiaj a kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: mamelaw niza kya tabakiay a kilang izaw ku buhang nya tabakiay a kilang.
S.PHON: mamər~ɾaw niza kja tabakiaj a kir~ɾaŋ izaw ku buħaŋ nja tabakiaj a kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 看到那棵大樹有洞.
He saw a big tree with a big hole.

S.FORM: tayza ciniza a mimelaw u canan kina hiya sa.
S.PHON: tajza ʦiniza a mimər~ɾaw u ʦanan kina ħija sa.
S.FORM: tayza ciniza a mimelaw u canan kina hiya sa.
S.PHON: tajza ʦiniza a mimər~ɾaw u ʦanan kina ħija sa.
S.TRANSL: 他去看是什麼.
He went to see what it is.

S.FORM: susu' han nya wawa kya buhang nya kilang sa.
S.PHON: susuʔ~ʡ ħan nja wawa kja buħaŋ nja kir~ɾaŋ sa.
S.FORM: susu' han nya wawa kya buhang nya kilang sa.
S.PHON: susuʔ~ʡ ħan nja wawa kja buħaŋ nja kir~ɾaŋ sa.
S.TRANSL: 那小孩把手伸進樹洞裡.
That child put his hand into the tree hole.

S.FORM: tahkal ku kung.
S.PHON: taħkar~ɾ ku kuŋ.
S.FORM: tahkal ku kung.
S.PHON: taħkar~ɾ ku kuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹出來.
The owl went out.

S.FORM: mihica kisu matawid kya wawa tya kung.
S.PHON: miħiʦa kisu matawid kja wawa tja kuŋ.
S.FORM: mihica kisu matawid kya wawa tya kung.
S.PHON: miħiʦa kisu matawid kja wawa tja kuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 貓頭鷹說:「你做什麼?」小孩被貓頭鷹嚇到了.
The owl said, "what are you doing?" and the child was shocked by owl.

S.FORM: mapatawid nya wawa kya mapatawid nya kung kya wawa.
S.PHON: mapatawid nja wawa kja mapatawid nja kuŋ kja wawa.
S.FORM: mapatawid nya wawa kya mapatawid nya kung kya wawa.
S.PHON: mapatawid nja wawa kja mapatawid nja kuŋ kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩被貓頭鷹嚇到.
The child was shocked by the owl.

S.FORM: mahatik nai tiza i kilang kya wawa.
S.PHON: maħatik nai tiza i kir~ɾaŋ kja wawa.
S.FORM: mahatik nai tiza i kilang kya wawa.
S.PHON: maħatik nai tiza i kir~ɾaŋ kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩從樹上掉下來.
The child fell off the tree.

S.FORM: ya tatekuh han ya tatekuh u canan ku namahiniay.
S.PHON: ja tatəkuħ ħan ja tatəkuħ u ʦanan ku namaħiniaj.
S.FORM: ya tatekuh han ya tatekuh u canan ku namahiniay.
S.PHON: ja tatəkuħ ħan ja tatəkuħ u ʦanan ku namaħiniaj.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂就說:「這是什麼東西?」
Hornet said, "what is this?"

S.FORM: tada mihuyahuytu a enengan aku sa kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: tada miħujaħujtu a ənəŋan aku sa kja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: tada mihuyahuytu a enengan aku sa kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: tada miħujaħujtu a ənəŋan aku sa kja tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂說:「我住的地方怎麼一直搖呢?」
The hornet wondered, "why is my home shaking?

S.FORM: lalaba han nya tatekuh kya wacu amaidih mikalat tya wacu.
S.PHON: r~ɾar~ɾaba ħan nja tatəkuħ kja waʦu amaidiħ mikar~ɾat tja waʦu.
S.FORM: lalaba han nya tatekuh kya wacu amaidih mikalat tya wacu.
S.PHON: r~ɾar~ɾaba ħan nja tatəkuħ kja waʦu amaidiħ mikar~ɾat tja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 虎頭蜂追狗想要咬狗.
The hornet wanted to bite that dog.

S.FORM: mabilil a mulaliw kya wacu ya wawa sa.
S.PHON: mabir~ɾir~ɾ a mur~ɾar~ɾiw kja waʦu ja wawa sa.
S.FORM: mabilil a mulaliw kya wacu ya wawa sa.
S.PHON: mabir~ɾir~ɾ a mur~ɾar~ɾiw kja waʦu ja wawa sa.
S.TRANSL: 那隻狗跟小孩趕緊跑了.
The dog and child ran away in a hurry.

S.FORM: mulaliwtu kuheni palaliwentu nuheni kya kung.
S.PHON: mur~ɾar~ɾiwtu kuħəni par~ɾar~ɾiwəntu nuħəni kja kuŋ.
S.FORM: mulaliwtu kuheni palaliwentu nuheni kya kung.
S.PHON: mur~ɾar~ɾiwtu kuħəni par~ɾar~ɾiwəntu nuħəni kja kuŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他們跑走了,貓頭鷹也被放走了.
They ran away, and the owl was released.

S.FORM: malaliw nuheni kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: mar~ɾar~ɾiw nuħəni kja tatəkuħ.
S.FORM: malaliw nuheni kya tatekuh.
S.PHON: mar~ɾar~ɾiw nuħəni kja tatəkuħ.
S.TRANSL: 他們擺脫虎頭蜂了.
They escaped from hornets.

S.FORM: tayzatu kuheni i hiya mamelaw nuheni kya tabakiay ungcuy.
S.PHON: tajzatu kuħəni i ħija mamər~ɾaw nuħəni kja tabakiaj uŋʦuj.
S.FORM: tayzatu kuheni i hiya mamelaw nuheni kya tabakiay ungcuy.
S.PHON: tajzatu kuħəni i ħija mamər~ɾaw nuħəni kja tabakiaj uŋʦuj.
S.TRANSL: 他們又去那裡看到大岩石.
They went there and saw a big rock.

S.FORM: u ca'ay ka u niya nisalamaan niza kya balaut kyami.
S.PHON: u ʦaʔ~ʡaj ka u nija nisar~ɾamaan niza kja bar~ɾaut kjami.
S.FORM: u ca'ay ka u niya nisalamaan niza kya balaut kyami.
S.PHON: u ʦaʔ~ʡaj ka u nija nisar~ɾamaan niza kja bar~ɾaut kjami.
S.TRANSL: 他可能在玩青蛙.
He probably played with the frog.

S.FORM: miliyaw ciniza a mikilim tya nipahabayan niza a balaut.
S.PHON: mir~ɾijaw ʦiniza a mikir~ɾim tja nipaħabajan niza a bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: miliyaw ciniza a mikilim tya nipahabayan niza a balaut.
S.PHON: mir~ɾijaw ʦiniza a mikir~ɾim tja nipaħabajan niza a bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 他重新去找他養的青蛙.
He searched for the frog he kept again.

S.FORM: izaw kya ungcuy kalic satu kya wawa tya ungcuy.
S.PHON: izaw kja uŋʦuj kar~ɾiʦ satu kja wawa tja uŋʦuj.
S.FORM: izaw kya ungcuy kalic satu kya wawa tya ungcuy.
S.PHON: izaw kja uŋʦuj kar~ɾiʦ satu kja wawa tja uŋʦuj.
S.TRANSL: 小孩爬上大石頭.
That child climbed up that rock.

S.FORM: balautaw balautaw sa ciniza.
S.PHON: bar~ɾautaw bar~ɾautaw sa ʦiniza.
S.FORM: balautaw balautaw sa ciniza.
S.PHON: bar~ɾautaw bar~ɾautaw sa ʦiniza.
S.TRANSL: 他大喊著:「青蛙啊!青蛙啊!」
He yelled, "Frog! Frog!"

S.FORM: micekul ciniza mimelaw tu zuma ha i izaw henay sa.
S.PHON: miʦəkur~ɾ ʦiniza mimər~ɾaw tu zuma ħa i izaw ħənaj sa.
S.FORM: micekul ciniza mimelaw tu zuma ha i izaw henay sa.
S.PHON: miʦəkur~ɾ ʦiniza mimər~ɾaw tu zuma ħa i izaw ħənaj sa.
S.TRANSL: 他探看還有其他的.
He was looking for other things.

S.FORM: ya buyu' tuyza sa izaw kya hiya ya caket.
S.PHON: ja bujuʔ~ʡ tujza sa izaw kja ħija ja ʦakət.
S.FORM: ya buyu' tuyza sa izaw kya hiya ya caket.
S.PHON: ja bujuʔ~ʡ tujza sa izaw kja ħija ja ʦakət.
S.TRANSL: 那個山有鹿.
There were deer in mountain.

S.FORM: mimelaw ciniza initu sa mikalic ciniza kacawen niza kya hiya kya caket kacaw han niza i pabaw sa mimelaw.
S.PHON: mimər~ɾaw ʦiniza initu sa mikar~ɾiʦ ʦiniza kaʦawən niza kja ħija kja ʦakət kaʦaw ħan niza i pabaw sa mimər~ɾaw.
S.FORM: mimelaw ciniza initu sa mikalic ciniza kacawen niza kya hiya kya caket kacaw han niza i pabaw sa mimelaw.
S.PHON: mimər~ɾaw ʦiniza initu sa mikar~ɾiʦ ʦiniza kaʦawən niza kja ħija kja ʦakət kaʦaw ħan niza i pabaw sa mimər~ɾaw.
S.TRANSL: 他爬到鹿身上去看.
He climbed up to the deer to see.

S.FORM: ingain han nya caket kya tangah niza sa.
S.PHON: iŋain ħan nja ʦakət kja taŋaħ niza sa.
S.FORM: ingain han nya caket kya tangah niza sa.
S.PHON: iŋain ħan nja ʦakət kja taŋaħ niza sa.
S.TRANSL: 鹿搖動著自己的頭.
The deer shook its head.

S.FORM: mahetik nai tiza i tangah nya caket kya wawa.
S.PHON: maħətik nai tiza i taŋaħ nja ʦakət kja wawa.
S.FORM: mahetik nai tiza i tangah nya caket kya wawa.
S.PHON: maħətik nai tiza i taŋaħ nja ʦakət kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩從鹿頭上掉下來.
The child fell off from the head of the deer.

S.FORM: ya wacu han tya wacu mahizatu.
S.PHON: ja waʦu ħan tja waʦu maħizatu.
S.FORM: ya wacu han tya wacu mahizatu.
S.PHON: ja waʦu ħan tja waʦu maħizatu.
S.TRANSL: 那狗也一樣掉下去.
That dog fell off in the same way.

S.FORM: tabilalac kya wacu mahetik i tiza hiya i sasa nya nya hiya nya nitizengan nuheni sa.
S.PHON: tabir~ɾar~ɾaʦ kja waʦu maħətik i tiza ħija i sasa nja nja ħija nja nitizəŋan nuħəni sa.
S.FORM: tabilalac kya wacu mahetik i tiza hiya i sasa nya nya hiya nya nitizengan nuheni sa.
S.PHON: tabir~ɾar~ɾaʦ kja waʦu maħətik i tiza ħija i sasa nja nja ħija nja nitizəŋan nuħəni sa.
S.TRANSL: 那狗滑倒,跌到下面他們站的地方.
The dog slipped and fell into where they stood.

S.FORM: u nanum u sauwac i labu kya sauwac mahetik kya wawa nai tiza i pabaw.
S.PHON: u nanum u sauwaʦ i r~ɾabu kja sauwaʦ maħətik kja wawa nai tiza i pabaw.
S.FORM: u nanum u sauwac i labu kya sauwac mahetik kya wawa nai tiza i pabaw.
S.PHON: u nanum u sauwaʦ i r~ɾabu kja sauwaʦ maħətik kja wawa nai tiza i pabaw.
S.TRANSL: 河很深,小孩從上面掉下來.
The river was deep and the child fell off from the upper part.

S.FORM: mahetik satu kya wawa sa.
S.PHON: maħətik satu kja wawa sa.
S.FORM: mahetik satu kya wawa sa.
S.PHON: maħətik satu kja wawa sa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩掉下來.
The child fell down.

S.FORM: misadangudanguy ciniza a kapah sa henay.
S.PHON: misadaŋudaŋuj ʦiniza a kapaħ sa ħənaj.
S.FORM: misadangudanguy ciniza a kapah sa henay.
S.PHON: misadaŋudaŋuj ʦiniza a kapaħ sa ħənaj.
S.TRANSL: 他試著游了一下,覺得還好.
He tried to swim, and felt it wasn't bad.

S.FORM: ca'ay kai labu kina nanum sa kya wawa.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kai r~ɾabu kina nanum sa kja wawa.
S.FORM: ca'ay kai labu kina nanum sa kya wawa.
S.PHON: ʦaʔ~ʡaj kai r~ɾabu kina nanum sa kja wawa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩說:「這水沒很深.」
The child said, "the water is not deep."

S.FORM: tya ini kisu sa kya wawa tya wacuan.
S.PHON: tja ini kisu sa kja wawa tja waʦuan.
S.FORM: tya ini kisu sa kya wawa tya wacuan.
S.PHON: tja ini kisu sa kja wawa tja waʦuan.
S.TRANSL: 小孩對狗說:「你在這裡喔!」
The dog said to the dog, "Here you are!"

S.FORM: muku han nya wawa kya wacu.
S.PHON: muku ħan nja wawa kja waʦu.
S.FORM: muku han nya wawa kya wacu.
S.PHON: muku ħan nja wawa kja waʦu.
S.TRANSL: 小孩扛著狗.
The child carried the dog.

S.FORM: namimuku kya wawa tya wacu sa maidih ciniza a mikilimtu anu i cuwa kya kya tatayzaan aku sa.
S.PHON: namimuku kja wawa tja waʦu sa maidiħ ʦiniza a mikir~ɾimtu anu i ʦuwa kja kja tatajzaan aku sa.
S.FORM: namimuku kya wawa tya wacu sa maidih ciniza a mikilimtu anu i cuwa kya kya tatayzaan aku sa.
S.PHON: namimuku kja wawa tja waʦu sa maidiħ ʦiniza a mikir~ɾimtu anu i ʦuwa kja kja tatajzaan aku sa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩想要去找,可是不知道要去哪裡.
The child wanted to search again, but he did not know where to go.

S.FORM: izaw izaw kya kilang mamelaw niza kya kilang.
S.PHON: izaw izaw kja kir~ɾaŋ mamər~ɾaw niza kja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: izaw izaw kya kilang mamelaw niza kya kilang.
S.PHON: izaw izaw kja kir~ɾaŋ mamər~ɾaw niza kja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他看到一棵樹.
He saw a tree.

S.FORM: ini kina kilang acatu kita nya kilakilang kacaw hantu nya wawa kya kilang.
S.PHON: ini kina kir~ɾaŋ aʦatu kita nja kir~ɾakir~ɾaŋ kaʦaw ħantu nja wawa kja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: ini kina kilang acatu kita nya kilakilang kacaw hantu nya wawa kya kilang.
S.PHON: ini kina kir~ɾaŋ aʦatu kita nja kir~ɾakir~ɾaŋ kaʦaw ħantu nja wawa kja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 樹在這裡,而且我們爬到樹上了.
The tree was here and we climbed up to it.

S.FORM: pakacawen niza kya wacu mikacaw ciniza i pabaw nya kilang.
S.PHON: pakaʦawən niza kja waʦu mikaʦaw ʦiniza i pabaw nja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: pakacawen niza kya wacu mikacaw ciniza i pabaw nya kilang.
S.PHON: pakaʦawən niza kja waʦu mikaʦaw ʦiniza i pabaw nja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他讓狗爬上去,他也爬到樹上.
He let the dog climb up and he climbed up too.

S.FORM: malcad satu u tamina a simsimen niza kya kya kilang.
S.PHON: mar~ɾʦad satu u tamina a simsimən niza kja kja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: malcad satu u tamina a simsimen niza kya kya kilang.
S.PHON: mar~ɾʦad satu u tamina a simsimən niza kja kja kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他心想這樹很像一艘船.
He regarded the tree as a ship.

S.FORM: tya mahiya kuheni tayzatu iza i sasa mahiya nu namun.
S.PHON: tja maħija kuħəni tajzatu iza i sasa maħija nu namun.
S.FORM: tya mahiya kuheni tayzatu iza i sasa mahiya nu namun.
S.PHON: tja maħija kuħəni tajzatu iza i sasa maħija nu namun.
S.TRANSL: 他們去到那裡的下面且沾到水.
They went down there and got wet.

S.FORM: izaw kya caytu kai labu kya nanum.
S.PHON: izaw kja ʦajtu kai r~ɾabu kja nanum.
S.FORM: izaw kya caytu kai labu kya nanum.
S.PHON: izaw kja ʦajtu kai r~ɾabu kja nanum.
S.TRANSL: 水不深.
The water was not deep.

S.FORM: tasasatu kuheni nai kilang.
S.PHON: tasasatu kuħəni nai kir~ɾaŋ.
S.FORM: tasasatu kuheni nai kilang.
S.PHON: tasasatu kuħəni nai kir~ɾaŋ.
S.TRANSL: 他們從樹上下來.
They came down from the tree.

S.FORM: izaw ku zuma a balaut.
S.PHON: izaw ku zuma a bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: izaw ku zuma a balaut.
S.PHON: izaw ku zuma a bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 有其他的青蛙.
There were other frogs.

S.FORM: a ini ku zuma a balaut sa.
S.PHON: a ini ku zuma a bar~ɾaut sa.
S.FORM: a ini ku zuma a balaut sa.
S.PHON: a ini ku zuma a bar~ɾaut sa.
S.TRANSL: 啊! 這裡還有其他的青蛙.
Ah! Here were other frogs.

S.FORM: anu cima kya balaut katuud kya balaut yadah yadah kya balaut sa.
S.PHON: anu ʦima kja bar~ɾaut katuud kja bar~ɾaut jadaħ jadaħ kja bar~ɾaut sa.
S.FORM: anu cima kya balaut katuud kya balaut yadah yadah kya balaut sa.
S.PHON: anu ʦima kja bar~ɾaut katuud kja bar~ɾaut jadaħ jadaħ kja bar~ɾaut sa.
S.TRANSL: 很多青蛙.
There were many frogs.

S.FORM: tiza satu amananahay kya wawa atu balaut.
S.PHON: tiza satu amananaħaj kja wawa atu bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: tiza satu amananahay kya wawa atu balaut.
S.PHON: tiza satu amananaħaj kja wawa atu bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 小孩和青蛙在那裡玩.
The child and frog played there.

S.FORM: miliyaw kuheni misalama misalama i nanunanuman.
S.PHON: mir~ɾijaw kuħəni misar~ɾama misar~ɾama i nanunanuman.
S.FORM: miliyaw kuheni misalama misalama i nanunanuman.
S.PHON: mir~ɾijaw kuħəni misar~ɾama misar~ɾama i nanunanuman.
S.TRANSL: 他們在水中一直玩.
They were playing in water.

S.FORM: matineng kya wawa a manamuh kya balaut i nanunanuman sa.
S.PHON: matinəŋ kja wawa a manamuħ kja bar~ɾaut i nanunanuman sa.
S.FORM: matineng kya wawa a manamuh kya balaut i nanunanuman sa.
S.PHON: matinəŋ kja wawa a manamuħ kja bar~ɾaut i nanunanuman sa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩知道青蛙喜歡在水中.
The child knew that the frog liked to be in water.

S.FORM: awza awza awza tini kita misalama han nya wawa kya balaut.
S.PHON: awza awza awza tini kita misar~ɾama ħan nja wawa kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: awza awza awza tini kita misalama han nya wawa kya balaut.
S.PHON: awza awza awza tini kita misar~ɾama ħan nja wawa kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 孩子對著青蛙說:「來來來!我們在這裡玩.」
The child said to the frog, "Come! Come! Come! Let's play here."

S.FORM: i labu nya nanum kuheni misalama kuheni midanguy kuheni.
S.PHON: i r~ɾabu nja nanum kuħəni misar~ɾama kuħəni midaŋuj kuħəni.
S.FORM: i labu nya nanum kuheni misalama kuheni midanguy kuheni.
S.PHON: i r~ɾabu nja nanum kuħəni misar~ɾama kuħəni midaŋuj kuħəni.
S.TRANSL: 他們在水裡玩水和游泳.
They were having fun in water and swimming.

S.FORM: tanunamuhsa kya wawa anu mahetihetik ciniza nai nanum sa.
S.PHON: tanunamuħsa kja wawa anu maħətiħətik ʦiniza nai nanum sa.
S.FORM: tanunamuhsa kya wawa anu mahetihetik ciniza nai nanum sa.
S.PHON: tanunamuħsa kja wawa anu maħətiħətik ʦiniza nai nanum sa.
S.TRANSL: 小孩非常高興即使他一再掉進水裡.
The child was very happy even thought he fell into water many times.

S.FORM: cay kabiyalaw ciniza.
S.PHON: ʦaj kabijar~ɾaw ʦiniza.
S.FORM: cay kabiyalaw ciniza.
S.PHON: ʦaj kabijar~ɾaw ʦiniza.
S.TRANSL: 它不緊張.
It was not nervous.

S.FORM: izaw kyami ku cabay niza tya zuma a balaut.
S.PHON: izaw kjami ku ʦabaj niza tja zuma a bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: izaw kyami ku cabay niza tya zuma a balaut.
S.PHON: izaw kjami ku ʦabaj niza tja zuma a bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 可能有其他的青蛙朋友.
It was probably due to other frogs.

S.FORM: nacacay kya balaut a salamaan niza yadahtu ayza kya balaut.
S.PHON: naʦaʦaj kja bar~ɾaut a sar~ɾamaan niza jadaħtu ajza kja bar~ɾaut.
S.FORM: nacacay kya balaut a salamaan niza yadahtu ayza kya balaut.
S.PHON: naʦaʦaj kja bar~ɾaut a sar~ɾamaan niza jadaħtu ajza kja bar~ɾaut.
S.TRANSL: 本來只有玩一隻青蛙 現在有很多隻青蛙.
There was one frog, but now there were many frogs.

S.FORM: misalamatu kuheni tu nanum.
S.PHON: misar~ɾamatu kuħəni tu nanum.
S.FORM: misalamatu kuheni tu nanum.
S.PHON: misar~ɾamatu kuħəni tu nanum.
S.TRANSL: 他們在玩水.
They were playing in water.

S.FORM: limulak satu ciniza i tiza i nanunanuman.
S.PHON: r~ɾimur~ɾak satu ʦiniza i tiza i nanunanuman.
S.FORM: limulak satu ciniza i tiza i nanunanuman.
S.PHON: r~ɾimur~ɾak satu ʦiniza i tiza i nanunanuman.
S.TRANSL: 它在水中很高興.
It was happy in water.
